mapper.select:
select count(*) from nx_platform_order_assign poa inner join nx_department_orders dor on dor.nx_department_orders_id = poa.nx_poa_order_id where poa.nx_poa_market_id = #{marketId} and poa.nx_poa_assign_status = 'PENDING' and poa.nx_poa_assign_mode = 'PLATFORM'
and dor.nx_DO_apply_date = #{applyDate}
